schoolProfile.notFoundDescription: The school you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been removed.

metadata.siteDescription: Interactive map and data platform for Malaysia's 528 Tamil schools. Track parliamentary mentions, MP scorecards, and school data.

constituency.title: Constituencies
constituency.pageDescription: Browse all 222 parliamentary constituencies with Tamil schools in Malaysia.
constituency.noSchools: No Tamil schools found in this area.
constituency.noActivity: No parliamentary activity recorded for {name} yet.

claim.title: Claim Your School
claim.pageDescription: Verify and update your Tamil school's information on SJK(T) Connect. Requires a valid @moe.edu.my email address.
claim.intro: Enter your school's official MOE email address to verify your identity. We'll send you a link to confirm and manage your school's page.
claim.step2: Check your inbox for the verification link
claim.step3: Click the link to verify your identity
claim.step4: You can then confirm or update your school's information
claim.verifyAndUpdate: Verify and update your school's information to keep it accurate.
claim.sentVerification: We've sent a verification link to
claim.linkExpires: The link expires in 24 hours. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

schoolEdit.confirmOrEdit: Click "Confirm" if all data is accurate, or edit below to make changes.
schoolEdit.onlyYourSchool: You can only edit your own school.

subscribe.title: Subscribe
subscribe.heading: Subscribe to Intelligence Blast
subscribe.intro: Stay informed about Malaysia's 528 Tamil schools. Receive parliamentary analysis, news alerts, and monthly intelligence digests.
subscribe.parliamentDesc: Analysis of Tamil school mentions in parliamentary debates
subscribe.newsDesc: Media monitoring alerts about Tamil schools
subscribe.monthlyDesc: Monthly digest of all Tamil school intelligence
subscribe.confirmSent: A confirmation email has been sent to
subscribe.manageNote: You can manage your preferences or unsubscribe at any time using the links in our emails.
subscribe.allEnabled: All categories are enabled by default. You can change these after subscribing.
subscribe.linkExpired: This link may have expired or already been used. Please contact us if you need help.
subscribe.removedFrom: has been removed from all SJK(T) Connect mailings.
subscribe.chooseTypes: Choose which types of intelligence you'd like to receive.
subscribe.prefLinkExpired: This link may have expired. Please use the link from your most recent email.
subscribe.whenMps: — when MPs discuss Tamil schools in Parliament

parliamentWatch.title: Parliament Watch — SJK(T) Connect
parliamentWatch.heading: Parliament Watch
parliamentWatch.intro: Tracking how Malaysian MPs discuss Tamil schools in Parliament. AI-powered analysis of Hansard proceedings with MP scorecards.
parliamentWatch.comingSoonBody: Parliament Watch reports are currently available on the admin portal. Public access will be enabled in a future update. In the meantime, explore the
parliamentWatch.noMentions: No parliamentary mentions found for this school yet.
parliamentWatch.historyIntro: Every Tamil school has a story worth telling. Help us preserve it.
parliamentWatch.historyBody: If you have information about this school's history — founding year, key milestones, notable alumni — we'd love to hear from you.
parliamentWatch.noPhoto: No photo available. Know this school? Help us by sharing a photo.
